error.signature: FreeRTOS: Stack overflow detected in task 'MainTask' (high water mark: 0)

verdict.summary: RTOS task stack overflowed. Stack too small for call depth, large local arrays, or recursive calls.

dead_ends.action: Double all task stack sizes blindly
dead_ends.why_fails: Wastes precious SRAM. Identify the offending task and size its stack based on actual usage.

dead_ends.action: Disable stack overflow checking to hide the error
dead_ends.why_fails: Stack corruption continues silently, corrupting adjacent task stacks or heap, causing random crashes.

workarounds.action: Check high water mark and increase offending task stack
workarounds.how: UBaseType_t hwm = uxTaskGetStackHighWaterMark(NULL); // words remaining. Increase stack by deficit + margin.

workarounds.action: Move large local arrays to static or heap allocation
workarounds.how: static uint8_t buf[1024]; // instead of stack-allocated. Or use pvPortMalloc().
#define configCHECK_FOR_STACK_OVERFLOW 2  // checks watermark on every context switch
